display.purpose: Hero and page-title headlines; Outfit 800, often italic on hero.

label.purpose: Mono uppercase metadata — numbers, timings, tags. Data only.

shadows.name: hover-lift
shadows.purpose: Cards and tiles on hover, with translateY(-2px).

shadows.name: accent-glow
shadows.purpose: Faint brand-hue glow under primary buttons.

shadows.name: form-panel
shadows.purpose: The lab form — most elevated element on its page.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Preferred easing for reveals and lifts — exponential ease-out, no bounce.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single call to action; every screen's path to Submit a Trial Case.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-primary">Submit Trial Case <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; background: #c23d1c; color: #fff; font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.75rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; box-shadow: 0 10px 15px -3px rgba(194,61,28,0.20); cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), transform 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), box-shadow 200ms; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #a03016; transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 20px 25px -5px rgba(194,61,28,0.30); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #d94d26; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Nav Link (pill)
components.description: Top-nav item; rest / hover / active pill states.
components.html: <nav class="ds-nav"><button class="ds-nav-link ds-active">Home</button><button class="ds-nav-link">How We Treat</button><button class="ds-nav-link">FAQs</button></nav>
components.css: .ds-nav { display: inline-flex; gap: 0.25rem; } .ds-nav-link { font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.75rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; color: #6d6c67; background: transparent; border: none; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; transition: color 200ms, background 200ms; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #c23d1c; background: #f7f7f6; } .ds-nav-link.ds-active { color: #c23d1c; background: #fdf2ee; } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #d94d26; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Clinical form field with mono-style label and brand focus ring.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.375rem; max-width: 22rem; } .ds-label { font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.75rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; color: #3b3936; } .ds-req { color: #be123c; } .ds-input { background: rgba(247,247,246,0.5); border: 1px solid #dedddb; border-radius: 0.75rem; padding: 0.75rem 1rem; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #242320; transition: border 200ms, box-shadow 200ms; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #6d6c67; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #d94d26; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #fbe3d9; }

components.name: Case Card
components.description: Content card — flat at rest, lifts on hover, hairline border, soft corners.
components.html:
Case Study #01Severe Complexity

Severe Anterior Crowding & Overlap

22 active stages with precision buccal attachments to guide rotation vectors.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #eeeeec; border-radius: 1.5rem; padding: 1.5rem; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(15,23,42,0.04); transition: box-shadow 300ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), transform 300ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); max-width: 22rem; } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 20px 25px -5px rgba(15,23,42,0.10); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-card-head { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; } .ds-meta { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.625rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; color: #6d6c67; } .ds-chip { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.625rem; padding: 0.125rem 0.5rem; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid; } .ds-chip-severe { background: #fff1f2; color: #be123c; border-color: #ffe4e6; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.125rem; line-height: 1.35; color: #17181d; margin: 0.25rem 0; } .ds-card-body { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #524f4b; margin: 0; }

components.name: Timing Eyebrow (glass pill)
components.description: Brand-tinted glass pill carrying a mono timing label — the signature instrumentation detail.
components.html: Full setup in 24 hours
components.css: .ds-eyebrow { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; background: rgba(217,77,38,0.12); border: 1px solid rgba(217,77,38,0.30); color: #a03016; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.6875rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border-radius: 9999px; }

narrative.overview: Smilyx is a clear-aligner fabrication lab, and the interface should read like the inside of one: clean instrument surfaces, exact readouts, and a clinical calm that signals these people measure things to the micron. The system speaks clinician-to-clinician. Its job is to make a practitioner believe, before they submit a case, that the setup design and fabrication behind the screen are as rigorous as the copy claims. Confidence comes from exactness — precise numbers, monospace data labels, generous whitespace — not from decoration. The dominant material is bright, clinical white and near-white canvas layered over a warm graphite ink. A single signal-vermilion brand hue — the color of a calibration mark on a lab instrument — carries interactive intent and the diagnostic accents. The warm signal on a graphite field clears the sky-blue dental-template trap and fights the sterile / lifeless failure mode of pure clinical neutrals.
keyCharacteristics: Bright clinical white surfaces on a warm near-white canvas; depth from soft shadow, not heavy chrome.
One signal-vermilion hue owns all interaction; neutrals are warm graphite, never cool slate or cream.
Monospace metadata as the signature of instrumentation.
Fully rounded pills for actions and nav; large soft-cornered containers for content.
Restrained motion: hover lifts, gentle reveals, nothing bouncy.

rules.name: The One-Hue Rule
rules.body: Signal vermilion is the only chromatic accent in the interface chrome. Buttons, links, active states, focus rings — all one hue. Status teal/amber/rose are data, not decoration.

rules.name: The Warm-Graphite Rule
rules.body: Every neutral is warm graphite (chroma near zero, a hair toward the vermilion), never cool slate and never cream/beige. Graphite ties the neutrals to the signal hue.

rules.name: The Instrument-Label Rule
rules.body: Monospace is reserved for short precise metadata — numbers, timings, IDs, tags. Never set body copy, headings, or sentences in mono.

rules.name: The Geometric-Headline Rule
rules.body: Headings are always the display family at weight 700-800 with tracking <= -0.02em. Never letter-space headings positive.

rules.name: The Flat-At-Rest Rule
rules.body: Content surfaces are flat with only a hairline or shadow-sm at rest. Elevation is a response to state, never an ambient default.

dos: Do keep signal vermilion as the single interactive hue — one color a practitioner's eye follows to the case submission.
Do keep every neutral warm graphite; Lab Canvas (#f6f6f7), never cool slate and never cream or beige.
Do use brand-600/brand-700 for any vermilion fill under white text; brand-500 is 4.17:1 and fails AA as a button fill.
Do reserve JetBrains Mono for short precise metadata — numbers, timings, IDs, tags.
Do keep surfaces flat at rest and elevate only on state change.
Do verify contrast to WCAG 2.2 AA: body >= 4.5:1, large text >= 3:1, placeholders >= 4.5:1.
Do use full borders and background tints for emphasis.
Do give every animation a prefers-reduced-motion alternative.
Do let real clinical evidence — cases, the before/after slider, named clinicians — carry warmth.
donts: Don't drift into the generic dental-clinic template: teal/sky-and-white with stock smiling faces and everything over-rounded.
Don't slide into consumer DTC / gimmicky territory (pastels, hype, subscription-box tone).
Don't let precision tip into sterile / lifeless hospital software.
Don't import generic SaaS slop: gradient blobs, hero-metric templates, identical card grids, tracked eyebrows over every section.
Don't use background-clip:text gradient text or colored border-left/right side-stripes anywhere.
Don't set body copy, headings, or sentences in monospace — mono is data only.
Don't use muted graphite body text on a tinted ground below 4.5:1.
Don't add a second UI accent hue beyond signal vermilion and clinical status colors on data.
Don't revert any neutral to cool slate or drift it toward cream/beige — graphite ties the neutrals to the vermilion signal.
Don't pair Outfit with another geometric/humanist sans as a second font — fix the Outfit+Inter pairing via typeset.
